details: The paper DOI matches, compound and mp context are present, but the claimed evidence quote is not verbatim under the allowed normalization; the source text has H 2 O formatting and continues with the literature mp value.
DOI, compound 8 context, melting-point value 114-116 °C, midpoint 115 °C, and measured experimental context all match the paper.
DOI, full compound 2f entry, m.p. 232-234 °C, midpoint 233 °C, and measured synthesis context all match the paper.

The mp 214-216 °C appears in the cited item, but the row compound name omits the leading tacrine-triazole portion printed in the paper: (1-(2-Oxo-2-((1,2,3,4-tetrahydroacridin-9-yl)amino)ethyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)methyl ...
The cited paper reports compound 2b as mp 170°C-173°C, but the row records only 170°C with no range or midpoint.
DOI, compound 4 context, m.p. 250-253 °C, midpoint 251.5 °C, and measured synthesis context all match the paper.
DOI, compound 9 context, m.p. 265°C, value 265 °C, and measured experimental context all match the paper.
DOI, compound 3 synthesis paragraph, mp 173-175°C, midpoint 174 °C, and measured experimental context all match the paper.
DOI, compound 8a entry, mp 280-283 °C (dec), midpoint 281.5 °C, decomposition property, and measured experimental context all match the paper.
DOI, compound 11 context, m.p. 182-184 °C, midpoint 183 °C, and measured experimental context all match the paper.
